name: Runner Overview docs (/docs/runner)
description: Public Qontinui Runner documentation overview. Adoption-sweep port of docs-runner.spec.ts 'Runner Overview (/docs/runner)' describe block (structural half: main heading + description, key capabilities, system requirements, key features, documentation-section links, download CTA). 'loads without 500' is covered by the C8 crawl + run-level HTTP-500 invariant; this spec adds the structural element-presence assertions. Element ids captured from a ci-bot CI element-dump: heading-1-qontinui-runner is the H1; 'What is Qontinui Runner', 'System Requirements', 'Key Features' H2s are stable anchors. Public page. Read-only; structural only. (The 7 docs-runner SUB-pages — installation/execution/monitoring/multi-monitor/troubleshooting/ai-integration/workflow-descriptions — are covered for loads-without-500 by the C8 crawl; their deep prose-section assertions are low-value structural residue left as a worklist item.)

states.name: Runner overview header
states.description: Page H1 + 'What is Qontinui Runner' H2. Ports docs-runner.spec.ts:75/92.

states.name: Overview content sections
